description: Create a technical 'exploded view' animation for a product assembly consisting of Case_Bottom, Battery, Circuit_Board, and Case_Top. The assembly should be fully closed at Frame 1 and vertically separated along the Z-axis by Frame 48, with Case_Top highest, followed by Circuit_Board, Battery, and Case_Bottom. Set the scene end frame to 60. Render Frame 48 to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/exploded_view.png and save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/exploded_view.blend.
